reason: The node is labeled inference type 'assumption' but it is NOT an assumption. It claims to be a consequence of the main theorem applied to the NPA setting: 'By the main theorem, any extreme point phi of the level-k feasible set satisfies...' This is an application/corollary, not a foundational assumption. It should be labeled as a 'corollary' or 'application' that depends on the main theorem (Nodes 1.3-1.4) and the NPA setup (Node 1.10.1). Labeling it as an assumption obscures the proof structure and makes it unclear what is being assumed versus derived.
